title: WT MS REPLICATE 1
treatment_protocol_ch1: Seedlings were grown on 1/2 MS medium or 1/2 MS+ ABA medium
growth_protocol_ch1: Seeds of each genotype were surface sterilized with 70% ethanol followed by 2 % sodium hypochloride with repeated rinses with dd-water, and were grown in 1/2MS media for seven days.
extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA extraction from whole seedlings was performed according to the manufacturer's instructions using the Qiagen RNeasy Plant mini kit.
label_protocol_ch1: Biotinylated aRNA were prepared according to the revised 3' IVT Affymetrix protocol from 500ng total RNA.
hyb_protocol: Following fragmentation, 12.5 ug of aRNA were hybridized for 16 h at 450C on ATH1 Array. GeneChips were washed and stained in the Affymetrix Fluidics Station 450.
scan_protocol: GeneChips were scanned using the Affymetrix Gene Chip Scanner 3300.
description: Gene expression analysis from one week old seedlings
data_processing: The raw data (CEL) files were analyzed using GeneSpring GX software (p value ≥ 0.05). We have used RMA algorithm for normalization.
